POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_light_dark_pomdp.light_dark_pomdp_utils package

Submodules

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_light_dark_pomdp.light_dark_pomdp_utils.test_light_dark_reward_models module

Tests for Light Dark POMDP reward models.

This module tests the reward models from light_dark_reward_models.py, focusing on: - Base reward model functionality - Continuous light dark reward model with obstacles - Dangerous states reward model with high variance - Decaying hit probability reward model

class POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_light_dark_pomdp.light_dark_pomdp_utils.test_light_dark_reward_models.TestBaseLightDarkRewardModel[source]

Bases: object

Test cases for base reward model.

test_abstract_class_cannot_be_instantiated()[source]

Test that abstract base class cannot be instantiated.

test_input_validation()[source]

Test input validation for state and action shapes.

class POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_light_dark_pomdp.light_dark_pomdp_utils.test_light_dark_reward_models.TestContinuousLDDangerousStatesRewardModel[source]

Bases: object

Test cases for dangerous states reward model.

setup_method()[source]

Set up test environment before each test method.

test_inheritance_from_base()[source]

Test that dangerous states model inherits correctly from base.

test_obstacle_reward_high_variance()[source]

Test that obstacle rewards have high variance (penalty or bonus).

test_obstacle_reward_probability_distribution()[source]

Test that obstacle rewards follow 50/50 probability distribution.

class POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_light_dark_pomdp.light_dark_pomdp_utils.test_light_dark_reward_models.TestContinuousLightDarkDecayingHitProbabilityRewardModel[source]

Bases: object

Test cases for decaying hit probability reward model.

setup_method()[source]

Set up test environment before each test method.

test_decaying_obstacle_probability()[source]

Test that obstacle hit probability decreases with distance.

test_inheritance_and_overrides()[source]

Test that decaying model inherits correctly and overrides methods.

test_obstacle_distance_calculation()[source]

Test that obstacle distance calculation works correctly.

test_penalty_decay_parameter_effect()[source]

Test that penalty_decay parameter affects probability decay rate.

test_reward_structure()[source]

Test that reward structure includes all expected components.

class POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_light_dark_pomdp.light_dark_pomdp_utils.test_light_dark_reward_models.TestContinuousLightDarkRewardModel[source]

Bases: object

Test cases for continuous light dark reward model.

setup_method()[source]

Set up test environment before each test method.

test_goal_detection_logic()[source]

Test that goal detection logic works correctly.

test_goal_state_reward()[source]

Test reward when next state is in goal region.

test_grid_boundary_detection_logic()[source]

Test that grid boundary detection logic works correctly.

test_normal_movement_reward()[source]

Test reward for normal movement without special conditions.

test_obstacle_collision_reward()[source]

Test reward when next state collides with obstacle.

test_obstacle_detection_logic()[source]

Test that obstacle detection logic works correctly.

test_out_of_grid_reward()[source]

Test reward when next state is out of grid.
